title: coupon — trait composition
description: Two owned traits. `BelongsToCoupon` is the FK trait for downstream models (CouponRedemption + future consumers like a marketing-event row tied to a specific coupon). `HasCouponRedemptions` is the inverse-side convenience on the parent Coupon model. Order matters when composed with `BelongsToTenant`: tenant MUST come first so subsequent traits observe the tenant context.

owned.description: Mixed into any domain model that carries a `coupon_id` FK. Adds the `coupon()` belongsTo relation and refuses cross-tenant writes at save time. Applied to CouponRedemption directly + planned marketing::MarketingEvent (Wave 5) that carries coupon_id for revenue attribution.
usedBy: growth::marketing::MarketingEvent (Wave 5 — marketing events fired on CouponRedeemed carry coupon_id for revenue attribution)

owned.description: Composed onto the Coupon model. Adds `->redemptions()` (hasMany), `->activeRedemptions()` (scope filter reversed_at IS NULL), `->reversedRedemptions()` (scope filter reversed_at IS NOT NULL). Convenience: `$coupon->redemptions_count` for the count.

framework.reason: Coupon model only — CouponRedemption is NOT soft-deletable (immutable audit trail). Retention pipeline handles hard-delete of coupons post 7y.

tenants.reason: Every owned row carries tenant_id per tenancy-columns.md §3.

audit.reason: Every write is compliance-relevant (financial-record 7-year retention). Every state transition on Coupon (is_active, valid_until, usage_count, applicable_plan_ids) + every reversed_at on CouponRedemption is audit-critical.

activity.reason: Coupon lifecycle transitions (created / activated / deactivated / expired / usage_cap_reached) feed the staff-visible activity feed. NOT on CouponRedemption (high volume — redemptions surface via CouponRedeemed event + the redemption ledger UI instead).

coupon.notes: Order: BelongsToTenant first. HasCouponRedemptions is the inverse-side convenience. SoftDeletes permits marking a coupon as deleted while retaining the audit trail through the retention window.

coupon_redemption.notes: NO SoftDeletes — CouponRedemption is 7y-retained HARD as a financial-audit record. Reversal is a soft-reversal (reversed_at set, row remains). NO HasActivityLog — high volume + already surfaces via CouponRedeemed / CouponClawbackCompleted events. Auditable is required for the 7-year financial audit trail. NO Searchable — redemption lookup is always by (customer_id, applied_to_id) or admin filter, never full-text search.
